text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I wanted to tell you something! Today, well...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna defeat you and seize victory with all of
my might!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I spent a lot of time trying to figure out what my
weapon is and how I should run in order to win.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if I'll be able to pull things off, but
I'm beyond prepared and ready.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to put everything I have on the line
today. I'm gonna be the hero today!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You really are a star, Biko...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: All right. I'm not going to lose to you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I won't hold back! I'll beat you using my own
weapon and all my strength!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two exchange declarations of war, and the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen goes off with a bang!
